feed.title: AI Security Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: AIセキュリティに関する日次ニュースダイジェスト - 研究・ニュース・政策動向を自動収集・要約

entry.title: Critical NGINX Vulnerability Can Crash Workers and May Allow Remote Code Execution
entry.content:
F5 has shipped fixes for a critical nginx flaw that lets a remote, unauthenticated attacker trigger a heap buffer overflow in the worker process with crafted HTTP requests. CVE-2026-42533 was patched

Source: The Hacker News

news

entry.title: UAC-0145 Uses ClickFix CAPTCHAs to Infect Ukrainian Devices wih Malware
entry.content:
Russian state-sponsored threat actors have been observed leveraging the infamous ClickFix strategy to trick Ukrainian targets into infecting their own machines with data-stealing malware. According to

Source: The Hacker News

news

entry.title: SonicWall SMA Zero-Days Exploited Before Disclosure to Gain Root Access
entry.content:
A previously undocumented threat actor has been attributed to the exploitation of recently disclosed SonicWall Secure Mobile Access (SMA) 1000 series VPN appliances as zero-days prior their public dis

Source: The Hacker News

news
